diagrams.title: Bipartite Graph Example (K3,3)
diagrams.description: Complete bipartite graph with 3 vertices in each partition showing all cross-connections
elements: Edges: All 9 connections between U and V
diagrams.purpose: Visualize complete bipartite structure and understand partition concept

diagrams.title: 2-Coloring of C4 (Bipartite)
diagrams.description: A 4-cycle properly 2-colored with red and blue alternating
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate that even cycles can always be 2-colored properly

diagrams.title: 2-Coloring Failure for C5 (Non-Bipartite)
diagrams.description: A 5-cycle showing why it cannot be 2-colored without conflict
elements: v1 and v3 are both red and adjacent - CONFLICT
diagrams.purpose: Show that odd cycles cannot be properly 2-colored, proving non-bipartiteness

diagrams.title: Star Graph K1,5
diagrams.description: Central hub connected to 5 outer vertices forming a star shape
elements: 5 edges from center to each outer vertex
diagrams.purpose: Visualize special case of complete bipartite graph K1,n
